metric: excess = |G∩A| - |G|*|A|/n; paired one-sided E1>E0 across problems
d1_note: as-pre-registered excess metric is INCONCLUSIVE (control M1 not at null — inheritance is family-general imitation)
prime_metric: induced(t)=P(E1 fails t)-P(E0 fails t); contrast = mean induced on artifact-failing tests minus non-artifact tests

cells.prime_verdict: RECLASS (induced failures enriched on artifact's tests, p<0.05)

d1_prime_call: D1'/D1 => INCONCLUSIVE for RECLASS-vs-OOD. Artifact-imitation is FAMILY-GENERAL: the clean control M1 shows the STRONGEST inheritance (excess +2.23) AND artifact-specificity (contrast +0.713) of all cells — it copies the above-its-level artifact (fidelity 0.84) and lands AT it (lift). The only SINK-SPECIFIC signal is fidelity: sink cells ELABORATE (fidelity 0.59/0.64/0.61) and land BELOW the artifact; the clean cell COPIES and lands at it. D1 leans 'elaboration-degrades' but cannot assign RECLASS vs OOD.
